creator: Lars@koellers.net
text:
Seems to be fixed in 6-STABLE with

   sys/netinet/in.c    version  1.85.2.10

There seems to be other PR's which could be closed now.

kern/108197	[panic] [gif] [ip6] if_delmulti reference counting panic
kern/116077	[ip] [patch] 6.2-STABLE panic during use of multi-cast 
networking client
kern/120266	[panic] gnugk causes kernel panic when closing UDP sockets
kern/120343	[panic] Reproducible Crash - network interface related (kgdb 
output included)

Regards

Lars
